issues.finding: robots.txt file does not exist (returns 404)
issues.recommendation: Create public/robots.txt with User-agent: *, Allow: /, and Sitemap directive

issues.finding: @astrojs/sitemap not installed; no sitemap generated
issues.recommendation: Install @astrojs/sitemap and add to astro.config.mjs integrations array

issues.finding: No <link rel='canonical'> tag rendered on any page despite canonicalURL variable being computed
issues.recommendation: Add <link rel='canonical' href={canonicalURL} /> to the <head> section

issues.finding: Fallback domain is deflocksc.netlify.app instead of deflocksc.org
issues.recommendation: Change fallback from 'https://deflocksc.netlify.app' to 'https://deflocksc.org'

issues.finding: No custom 404 page exists (src/pages/404.astro missing)
issues.recommendation: Create src/pages/404.astro with branded layout, navigation links, and search suggestion

issues.finding: Zero JSON-LD structured data on any page
issues.recommendation: Add FAQPage schema to homepage, Article schema to blog posts, Organization schema sitewide

issues.finding: Blog featured images missing width and height attributes causing CLS
issues.recommendation: Add width and height attributes or CSS aspect-ratio to reserve layout space

issues.finding: Related post images missing loading='lazy' attribute
issues.recommendation: Add loading='lazy' to related post images

issues.finding: No security headers configured in netlify.toml
issues.recommendation: Add [[headers]] section with X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy

issues.finding: Google Fonts loaded via render-blocking <link> stylesheet
issues.recommendation: Self-host fonts or use non-render-blocking loading pattern

issues.finding: Homepage meta description is 101 characters (below 120 recommended minimum)
issues.recommendation: Expand to 130-155 characters while keeping the urgency

issues.finding: og:type hardcoded to 'website' on blog posts instead of 'article'
issues.recommendation: Accept ogType prop, default to 'website', pass 'article' from blog template

issues.finding: Missing og:site_name meta property
issues.recommendation: Add <meta property='og:site_name' content='DeflockSC' />

issues.finding: Default title fallback is only 'DeflockSC' (11 chars, not descriptive)
issues.recommendation: Change default to 'DeflockSC - Stop License Plate Surveillance in South Carolina'

issues.finding: No hreflang tags (expected for single-language English site)
issues.recommendation: No action needed unless adding multilingual content

issues.finding: @fontsource-variable/inter is in package.json but never imported
issues.recommendation: Remove with npm uninstall @fontsource-variable/inter

issues.finding: RSS feed properly implemented with auto-discovery link in head
issues.recommendation: No action needed

issues.finding: Astro.generator meta tag reveals framework version
issues.recommendation: Optional: remove to avoid revealing tech stack

issues.finding: All external links use rel='noopener' and sr-only 'opens in new tab' text
issues.recommendation: No action needed -- excellent practice

issues.finding: All images have appropriate alt text; decorative images use alt='' aria-hidden='true'
issues.recommendation: No action needed

issues.finding: All animations respect prefers-reduced-motion media query
issues.recommendation: No action needed -- excellent accessibility practice

checklist.details: All 4 page templates have unique, descriptive titles under 60 chars
Present on all pages; homepage at 101 chars is below 120 target
No <link rel='canonical'> rendered on any page
Exactly 1 H1 per page; proper H2>H3 nesting in all components
All images have descriptive alt text
Zero structured data on any page
HTTPS enforced; no mixed content in source
Nav links all pages; toolkit uses descriptive anchor text
Skip to main content link present
Most images lazy-loaded; related posts missing it
